findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Zip Slip - ZipEntry name flows to File constructor without path traversal check
 * @description ZipEntry.getName() used to construct file paths can enable zip slip attacks
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/zip-slip-goomph
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module ZipSlipConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr ce |
      ce.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
      sink.asExpr() = ce.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("get") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.nio.file", "Paths") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("resolve") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.nio.file", "Path") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
  }
}

module ZipSlipFlow = TaintTracking::Global<ZipSlipConfig>;
import ZipSlipFlow::PathGraph

from ZipSlipFlow::PathNode source, ZipSlipFlow::PathNode sink
where ZipSlipFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "ZipEntry name flows to file path construction, potential zip slip."
findings.hypothesis: ZipEntry.getName() flows to File constructor without path traversal check (Zip Slip)

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal in ZipMisc - unvalidated ZipEntry names used for file extraction
 * @description ZipMisc.java uses ZipEntry.getName() to construct File paths without validating for traversal sequences
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/zipmiscpath-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find ZipEntry.getName() calls in ZipMisc that flow to File constructors
// without any containment check (getCanonicalPath, startsWith, etc.)
from MethodCall getName, ClassInstanceExpr fileNew, Method m
where
  getName.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") and
  getName.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("com.diffplug.gradle", "ZipMisc") and
  fileNew.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  fileNew.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  // No canonical path check nearby 
  not exists(MethodCall canonCheck |
    canonCheck.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    (canonCheck.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     canonCheck.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
     canonCheck.getMethod().hasName("normalize"))
  )
select fileNew, "ZipMisc creates File from ZipEntry name without path traversal validation in method " + m.getName()
findings.hypothesis: ZipMisc.java extracts ZIP entries to files without checking for path traversal in entry names

message.text: ZipMisc creates File from ZipEntry name without path traversal validation in method unzip

findings.hypothesis: Detailed ZipMisc zip slip path flow confirmation

message.text: ZipMisc.unzip(): ZipEntry.getName() flows to File constructor without path traversal check - Zip Slip vulnerability.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal in archive/resource extraction across codebase
 * @description ZipEntry or JarEntry names used to construct File paths without containment checks
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/archive-entry-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find all methods in com.diffplug.gradle packages that use ZipEntry/JarEntry names
// to create File objects without any canonicalization check
from MethodCall getName, ClassInstanceExpr fileNew, Callable enclosing
where
  getName.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  (
    getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") or
    getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") or
    getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.jar", "JarEntry")
  ) and
  enclosing = getName.getEnclosingCallable() and
  fileNew.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  fileNew.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosing and
  not exists(MethodCall safeCheck |
    safeCheck.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosing and
    (safeCheck.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     safeCheck.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalFile") or
     safeCheck.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath"))
  )
select fileNew, "File constructed in method '" + enclosing.getName() + "' in " +
  enclosing.getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName() + 
  " where ZipEntry/JarEntry.getName() is also called without canonical path check."
findings.hypothesis: Archive entry names (ZipEntry/JarEntry) flow to File constructors without canonicalization across the codebase

message.text: File constructed in method 'unzip' in com.diffplug.gradle.ZipMisc where ZipEntry/JarEntry.getName() is also called without canonical path check.
File constructed in method 'getLibraryFromFragment' in com.diffplug.gradle.eclipserunner.launcher.Main where ZipEntry/JarEntry.getName() is also called without canonical path check.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Verify ZipMisc.unzip has no path traversal protection
 * @description Check whether ZipMisc.unzip() has any protection against path traversal in ZipEntry names
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/zipmiscunzip-verify-no-protection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Check all method calls within ZipMisc.unzip to see if any protection exists
from Callable unzipMethod, MethodCall mc
where
  unzipMethod.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("com.diffplug.gradle", "ZipMisc") and
  unzipMethod.hasName("unzip") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = unzipMethod
select mc, "Method call in ZipMisc.unzip: " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Verify what methods are called inside ZipMisc.unzip to check for any path traversal protection

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name File path construction from external parameters without validation
 * @description File or Path objects constructed from method parameters that flow from untrusted sources without canonicalization or containment checks
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/file-from-param-no-validation
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from Method m, Parameter p, ClassInstanceExpr fileNew
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("com.diffplug.gradle%") and
  p = m.getAParameter() and
  p.getType() instanceof TypeString and
  fileNew.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  fileNew.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  DataFlow::localFlow(DataFlow::parameterNode(p), DataFlow::exprNode(fileNew.getAnArgument())) and
  not exists(MethodCall canon |
    canon.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    (canon.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalFile") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("normalize"))
  )
select fileNew, "File constructed from String parameter '" + p.getName() + "' in method '" + m.getName() + "' without path canonicalization or traversal check"
findings.hypothesis: File constructed from method parameters without path validation in com.diffplug.gradle package

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal in P2/PDE installation - archive extraction without entry name validation
 * @description P2BootstrapInstallation and related classes extract archives with ZipEntry names flowing to file system ops without validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/p2-archive-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find all ZipEntry getName() calls that flow to File constructors in p2/pde packages
from MethodCall getName, Callable enclosing
where
  getName.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  (
    getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") or
    getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry")
  ) and
  enclosing = getName.getEnclosingCallable() and
  enclosing.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("com.diffplug.gradle%") and
  not exists(MethodCall safeCheck |
    safeCheck.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosing and
    (safeCheck.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     safeCheck.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalFile") or
     safeCheck.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
     safeCheck.getMethod().hasName("startsWith"))
  )
select getName, "ZipEntry.getName() called in " + enclosing.getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName() + "." + enclosing.getName() + " without subsequent path validation (no canonical path check, no startsWith containment check)"
findings.hypothesis: P2/PDE installation and other gradle packages use ZipEntry names without path traversal validation

message.text: ZipEntry.getName() called in com.diffplug.gradle.ZipMisc.read without subsequent path validation (no canonical path check, no startsWith containment check)

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ZipMisc modify/read - ZipEntry name flows to file output stream
 * @description Check whether ZipMisc.modify/read use ZipEntry names for output file operations
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/zipmiscmodify-path-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Specifically look for getName() calls in ZipMisc that flow to FileOutputStream or similar
from MethodCall getName, MethodCall fileOp, Callable enclosing
where
  getName.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") and
  enclosing = getName.getEnclosingCallable() and
  enclosing.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("com.diffplug.gradle", "ZipMisc") and
  fileOp.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosing and
  (
    fileOp.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileOutputStream") or
    fileOp.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileWriter") or
    fileOp.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.nio.file", "Files") or
    (fileOp.getMethod().hasName("putNextEntry") and 
     fileOp.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipOutputStream"))
  )
select getName, "ZipEntry.getName() called in ZipMisc." + enclosing.getName() + " with file operation " + fileOp.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + fileOp.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: ZipMisc.modify and ZipMisc.read use entry names for output streams in ways that could be exploitable
